Feedback? Ideas? Complaints? Suggestions? Request for report about other area? send me a message!
This page was generated using data obtained on 2023-09-22. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




Proposed edits at this page are so obvious that automatic edit makes sense.
  • wikipedia tag unexpected language
  • wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for brand prefixed tags
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for network prefixed tags

wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal
wikipedia tag in outdated form (['wikipedia:en']), with wikipedia and wikidata tag present and may be safely removed
Indiana - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( relation(1994099)['wikidata'='Q8560764']['wikipedia'='es:Distrito de Indiana']['wikipedia:en'='Indiana District, Maynas']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for brand prefixed tags
brand:wikidata and brand:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because brand:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
operator:wikidata and operator:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because operator:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
